label: garden_plan
value: Planning to enhance the garden with a budget of around $100, interested in high-quality seeds and essential tools such as heirloom tomatoes, leafy greens, herbs, flowers, a garden fork or trowel, pruning shears, a watering can, a soaker hose, and mulch.

label: food_preferences
value: Excited about trying easy plant-based recipes such as chickpea salad, lentil soup, quinoa stuffed peppers, and sweet potato and black bean tacos. Interested in tips for making the most out of seasonal vegetables and incorporating more greens into the diet without making them the main focus of every meal.

label: hobbies_and_projects
value: Focusing on gardening, cooking, and book club activities as top hobbies. Gardening includes winter care for hardy plants, planning for spring, and starting an indoor herb garden. Cooking involves quick and easy recipes, fish-based dishes, and incorporating fish themes into desserts. Book club plans include expanding membership, meeting more frequently, introducing themed meetings, and possibly holding virtual meetings.

label: book_club_details
value: Book club is expanding membership and considering a bi-weekly meeting schedule, themed meetings, virtual meetings, and book club challenges.

label: retirement_community_interest
value: Considering moving to a retirement community that offers an active social life, with considerations for financial situation.

label: upcoming_events
value: Interested in attending Genealogy Workshop on January 20th, Local History Lecture Series on the third Thursday of every month, Winter Garden Workshop on January 15th, and Garden Club Meeting on the first Saturday of every month.

label: genealogical_research_interest
value: Received old family letters and photos from a distant relative and plans to dedicate several hours each day to documenting the family's history. Interested in strategies for organizing and preserving these items.

label: community_involvement
value: More involved in organizing community events like the weekly garden club and monthly genealogy workshops, aiming to balance social activities with a low-maintenance lifestyle.

label: cooking_preferences
value: Cooking preferences involve using pre-prepared ingredients, slow cookers, and experimenting with fish-based dishes and fish-themed desserts.

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Prefers scenic, knee-friendly routes for hiking.

label: genealogical_research_tools
value: Recommended tools for managing and sharing digital files include Google Drive, Dropbox, Microsoft OneDrive for cloud storage; RootsMagic, Ancestry Desktop, Family Tree Maker for genealogy; Adobe Lightroom, Picasa, Daminion for photo management; Trove, FileMaker Pro for file management; Ancestry, MyHeritage, FamilySearch for sharing and collaboration; Facebook Groups, Tabletopia for social media and community platforms; Evernote, Notion for note-taking and research management; MyHeritage App, Ancestry App, RootsMagic App for mobile access.

label: event_planning_tools
value: Using Trello, Asana, or Volgistics for task management and tracking progress, creating detailed checklists for recurring events.

label: gardening_tips
value: Interested in organic pest control methods including neem oil, insecticidal soap, diatomaceous earth, garlic and chili pepper spray, beneficial insects, row covers, and companion planting.

label: pickleball_preferences
value: Advanced pickleball player seeking strategies and drills to elevate game, focusing on precise placement, serve variations, dinking, lobbing, net play, and improved footwork.

label: interests
value: Joined a new hiking group exploring the rolling hills around the area, interested in planning a scenic outing for the group.

label: future_activities_and_projects
value: Joined a new knitting group that focuses on intermediate patterns, aiming to improve knitting skills.

label: dietary_preferences
value: Interested in incorporating more plant-based meals into the diet while still enjoying occasional meat dishes.

label: bridge_preferences
value: Interested in bridge clubs or groups that focus on the history and strategy behind the game, including local clubs with historical focus, strategy workshops, online communities like Bridge Base Online and Reddit's r/bridge, educational resources such as books and online courses, genealogy workshops, local historical societies, conventions and seminars, lectures, YouTube channels, podcasts, and special interest groups within bridge clubs.

label: gardening_and_cooking_tips
value: Winter vegetables and herbs that are easy to grow and use in cooking include kale, spinach, carrots, Brussels sprouts, leeks, rosemary, sage, thyme, and chives. Indoor herbs like basil, mint, and parsley can also be grown easily.

label: knitting_preferences
value: Interested in finding online resources and communities for inspiration on stylish knitting projects, including websites like Ravelry, Knitty, Interweave Knits, Very Pink Knits, social media platforms like Instagram and Pinterest, YouTube channels like The Knitting Nerd, Knit Picks, and Amy Christoffers, online communities like Ravelry Forums and Reddit r/knitting, and educational resources like Craftsy and Udemy.

label: stress_management_techniques
value: Techniques for managing stress related to organizing events include breaking down tasks, prioritizing tasks, setting realistic goals, communicating effectively, taking breaks, seeking support, staying organized, practicing mindfulness and relaxation techniques, focusing on positive outcomes, and learning to say no. Specific event planning tips include creating a checklist, preparing for contingencies, and evaluating after each event.

label: new_role_and_responsibilities
value: Elected as the new coordinator for the senior center's volunteer program, responsible for organizing more events and managing time effectively.

label: time_management_strategies
value: Prioritizing tasks, using scheduling tools like Google Calendar, Doodle, When2Meet, Slack, Microsoft Teams, delegating responsibilities, streamlining communication, organizing and planning ahead with tools like Trello, Asana, Volgistics, managing stress through breaks and delegation, evaluating and adjusting post-event, setting boundaries, and ensuring self-care.

label: volunteer_program_management_tools
value: Recommended tools for managing a volunteer program include Slack/Microsoft Teams for real-time messaging, WhatsApp Business for group messaging, Trello and Asana for task management, Volgistics for volunteer management, Google Calendar and Doodle for scheduling, VolunteerMatch and Idealist for volunteer recruitment, Google Drive/Dropbox/Microsoft OneDrive for document management, Hootsuite/SocialBee for social media management, Mailchimp for email marketing, QuickBooks/Zoho Books for financial management, and Eventbrite/Facebook Events for event management.
